title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
